creator: maurizio1018@gmail.com
text:
I have the same problem running FreeBSD 13.1-RC2 on a Lenovo ThinkPad T450, suspend/resume doesn't always work.

$ pciconf -vl | grep -A4 vgapci
vgapci0@pci0:0:2:0:	class=0x030000 rev=0x09 hdr=0x00 vendor=0x8086 device=0x1616 subvendor=0x17aa subdevice=0x5034
    vendor     = 'Intel Corporation'
    device     = 'HD Graphics 5500'
    class      = display
    subclass   = VGA

drm-fbsd13-kmod-5.4.144.g20220223

If I try to unload i915kms.ko the system reboots.
